scripts.dev: concurrently -n apex,web -c blue,green "npm run dev:apex" "npm run dev:frontend"
scripts.dev:apex: cd .. && if [ -x .venv/bin/python ]; then .venv/bin/python -m uvicorn backend_api:app --reload --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8000; else python -m uvicorn backend_api:app --reload --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8000; fi
scripts.dev:market: bash -c 'cd backend && export PYTHONPATH=../../src:${PYTHONPATH:-} && PY=python3; if [ -x ../.venv/bin/python ]; then PY=../.venv/bin/python; fi; $PY -m uvicorn main:app --reload --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8001'
scripts.install:all: cd backend && pip install -r requirements.txt && cd ../frontend && npm install
